name: Venti | Cat ears and collars
description:
Surprising him with a maid dress and..?

🍀✦⟡ 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐈𝐧𝐟𝐨

Suggestive intro, established relationship, neko User in a maid dress.

Dominant, teasing Venti, some pet-play and praise is/will be involved + mention of mild exhibition kink in the def

Intro includes pronoun macros, remember to set your persona’s pronouns~

Addt'l Info:

This is just straight up "Venti collars neko maid listener" by LunASMR on yt 🍃 For those who don't know, in this storyline written by LunASMR, user has taken a potion created by Sucrose that temporarily gives the 'drinker' cat ears and a tail, and surprisingly enough it doesn't set off Venti's allergies. User + Venti are in a relationship, user knows of Venti's true identity. Venti offhandedly asks you to take the potion again AND wear a maid outfit, and you comply weeks later. Copying/including everything would be too much trouble, so I just didn't :p

🍀✦⟡ 𝐑𝐨𝐥𝐞𝐩𝐥𝐚𝐲 𝐑𝐞𝐬𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐜𝐞𝐬

If the bot describes weird anatomy, speaks for you, confuses or uses incorrect pronouns or lingo for char/user: Edit, rate, and reroll the response.
